01 — About

The Human Behind The Code

Full-Stack
QA Engineer

I'm Kevin Serem — a developer who cares deeply about the people using what I build. Based in Kenya, I work with teams worldwide to create software that's not just functional, but genuinely reliable and secure.

What makes me different? I bring an unusual combination: rigorous full-stack engineering, hands-on cybersecurity experience, and a background in Agricultural Economics that taught me to think in data, systems, and real-world impact.

02 — Expertise

What I Do Best

Full-Stack Development

Building performant web applications from database to UI. I focus on clean architecture, responsive design, and real-time API integrations that scale.

ReactNode.jsViteSQL

Cybersecurity

Security isn't an afterthought — it's built into every line I write. From threat modeling to encryption to API hardening, I protect what matters.

OWASPPen TestingEncryption

Agricultural Economics

My economics background gives me a unique edge — I translate complex data models, forecasting logic, and resource allocation into real digital tools.

AnalyticsData ModelingForecasting
03 — Work

Selected Projects

Full-Stack / Hospitality

Soy Resort Booking Portal

A luxury eco-resort platform with dynamic booking workflows, CRM integration, and a design system built for mobile-first client conversion.

HTML5CSS3JavaScriptVite

FinTech / Automation

Deriv Trading Bot

An algorithmic trading client using WebSocket connections to the Deriv platform. Features token validation, multi-scope auth, and zero-latency execution.

JavaScriptWebSocketDeriv APISecurity
Live Demo ↗ Source ↗
AgTech / Analytics

Yield Analytics Dashboard

A statistical dashboard mapping regional crop inputs against global pricing streams. Built with optimized data pipelines and dynamic chart rendering.

PythonChart.jsData PipelinesSQL

Let's Build Something Together.

Whether it's a full product build, a security audit, or a long-term collaboration — I'm genuinely excited to hear about your challenges. No corporate speak, just real engineering conversation.
